steps.title: Track the timeline
steps.content: The passage moves chronologically: Shakespeare likely arrived in London as early as 1585, was becoming known by 1593, and would delight audiences with As You Like It in 1600.

steps.title: Choose the time transition
steps.content: Choice A signals opposition, choice C signals cause and effect, and choice D signals restatement. The remaining transition signals that the 1600 achievement happened after the earlier events. The answer is B.
